issue.title: massgrave.dev

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://massgrave.dev/windows_ltsc_links](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmassgrave.dev%2Fwindows_ltsc_links) ### Comment > Хочу сообщить о ложном срабатывании фильтра безопасности для домена buzzheavier.com. Ваш сервис блокирует его, помечая как вредоносный сайт. > > Этот ресурс используется проектом Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) для хранения оригинальных ISO-образов Windows. Файлы, размещенные там, проходят проверку и соответствуют официальным хэш-суммам MVS/OEM. Это легитимный ресурс для пользователей проекта, и блокировка препятствует доступу к проверенным образам системы. > > Прошу провести повторную проверку данного домена. Если на нем не обнаружено реального вредоносного контента, пожалуйста, рассмотрите возможность исключения его из черного списка. ``` Username: @Spok1 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9wg6qwfu9swg8k0k84ogc80gw00s0sws5bh6hdv2hw.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2oh7mx10ah8g484soks4ogsgcws888widctfhweg34.png?nc=1)

issue.title: cwtv.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Where is the problem encountered? https://cwtv.com ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Other DNS server: | Private System version: | `macOS 27` Browser: | Firefox Blocklists: | **General**
AdGuard DNS filter
AdGuard DNS Popup Hosts filter
AWAvenue Ads Rule
OISD Blocklist Small
**Other**
Dandelion Sprout's Game Console Adblock List
HaGeZi's Apple Tracker Blocklist
HaGeZi's Samsung Tracker Blocklist
Perflyst and Dandelion Sprout's Smart-TV Blocklist
HaGeZi's Windows/Office Tracker Blocklist
**Security**
Phishing URL Blocklist (PhishTank and OpenPhish)
Dandelion Sprout's Anti-Malware List
HaGeZi's Badware Hoster Blocklist
uBlock₀ filters – Badware risks
NoCoin Filter List
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Comment When using the "Protection against typosquatting" setting, the valid website for the US TV network The CW is blocked as it thinks it's typosquatting "cctv.com". Even adding it as a user rule doesn't fix it, the only way it works is by disabling the typosquatting setting entirely or turning off AdGuard DNS. Also I tried submitting the issue at https://reports.adguard.com/en/new_issue.html and it told me "captcha: This value is too long. It should have 2000 characters or less." right as I hit submit. 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1:
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition
